widgets_values: Three people and a creature stand in front of shelves laden with various items. On the left, a brown-haired woman smiles, wearing a light brown tank top. Next to her is a humanoid figure with a body made of dark, rocky material and pronounced musculature, resembling onyx. This figure has a large head with sharp features. To the right of this figure is a muscular man with a light skin tone, wearing a necklace and with shoulder-length green hair; he wears a white crop top with a pink unicorn painted on it. The last individual, on the far right of the image, is a dark-haired woman wearing a black T-shirt. In the foreground are several plates of food: a white bowl with a creamy dish covered in red seasoning, a rectangular container filled with what appear to be strips of meat, a white bowl with fried and breaded pieces, and a white plate with several round, light brown cookies. Also in the foreground is a light blue object resembling a human head.

The interior of a bar features architecture with rounded, modular forms. A bar counter extends horizontally along the frame, showcasing a strip of acrylic. In the center-right, a man in his mid-thirties stands at the bar, resting one hand on the surface while holding a tall glass in the other. He turns his head to look directly at the camera, a playful, knowing smile spreading across his face. The glass contains a drink with small floating spheres that reflect the light. He wears a form-fitting uniform with a short, high collar and a single vertical stripe on the jacket. His brown hair is neatly styled with a clean, mid-century part. In the center, tending the bar, is a rather peculiar alien bartender, a colossal and terrifying humanoid figure resembling an octopus. He is a mass of tissue from whose torso emerges a network of thick tentacles. He is wearing black dress pants. And on its head, a set of multifaceted insectoid eyes constantly moves, scanning the room. The tentacles, with delicate pads at their tips, manipulate the glassware with unsettling grace. Behind the bartender, a mirrored wall reflects rows of liquor bottles with geometric labels. Above the bar floats a neon sign made of curved glass tubes that reads 'COSMIC LOUNGE' in tall, rounded letters, emitting light with a soft, glowing halo. An illuminated menu board reads 'SIGNATURE DRINKS' with three items: 'ORBITAL HIGHBALL,' 'NEBULA SOUR,' and 'ROCKET MARTINI,' each displayed on glowing horizontal bars. To the right, a cylindrical column features a vertical neon panel that reads 'OPEN 24 HOURS' in condensed letters within a translucent strip. To the left, a curved booth sits beneath a domed ceiling light. An illuminated sign reading 'GALAXY BAR SERVICE' encircles the inner rim of the dome in capitals and dominates the left side of the frame. Soft lighting reflects off the glass and acrylic surfaces, highlighting the structural design.

A woman seated on a large armchair with a cigarette between her fingers and smoke rising from it. She wears practical clothing consisting of green tactical pants stained, a loose-fitting white tank top that shows part of her torso, and a jacket with multiple pockets. She wears yellow-tinted goggles that match the color scheme of her outfit. Her hair is styled in a messy bob cut and frames her face, adding to her relaxed yet assertive demeanor. Behind her are towering metal and concrete structures, painted green to blend into the background, except for some red accents like a small box on the chair's side panel.

2 guys sitting at a bar with beers in glasses in front of them, one guy (pursed lips, eyes closed) turning head and white water spraying from his mouth to other's forehead, the other guy is wide-eyed surprised.

A powerfully built woman stands as the central figure, her face etched with determination and her gaze fixed upward as if receiving a signal.
She is encased in a bio‑mechanical suit that acts as a second skin of deep indigo and bioluminescent teal tendrils, both restraining and empowering her.
The suit pulses with subtle internal light that shifts between electric blue and vibrant violet, and glowing glyphs etched into its surface pulse with energy.
Gaps in the suit reveal smooth, almost pearlescent skin, hinting at genetic modification or cybernetic enhancement.
Her arms are raised in a pose of acceptance or control, not surrender.
The background is a swirling vortex of destruction and decay, rendered in bruised purple, rusted orange, and sickly green.
The scene takes place inside a massive, cylindrical structure that resembles a derelict space station or forgotten underground facility.
Walls are fractured and crumbling, their cracks resembling the veins of a dying organism, and are covered with glowing fungal growths.
Debris—concrete chunks stained with iridescent slime, twisted metal corroded with alien rust, and unidentified fragments—falls from a hole in the ceiling.
Harsh, blinding light streams through the opening, casting long, distorted shadows across the scene.
The overall atmosphere is claustrophobic and on the brink of collapse, emphasizing a world that is unraveling yet still vibrant and unsettling.
The vivid, unsettling color scheme amplifies the desolation and highlights the contrast between the steadfast woman and her poisoned, but not lifeless, environment.

A woman with short black hair and a futuristic outfit standing in a neon-lit cityscape on a rainy night. The woman, positioned centrally in the image, has chin-length straight black hair with blunt bangs and brown eyes; she wears a metallic trench coat with a high collar adorned with a tag "死" in orange. She holds an illuminated orange katana in her right hand. In the background, a large digital billboard displays an anime-style portrait of a woman with white hair and red eyes. The city street is dimly lit with neon signs and billboards casting a colorful glow on wet pavement and scattered puddles reflecting the vibrant lights, with rain falling throughout the scene

nodes.title: ⚡| Darth Vader at a fruit-selling market in Ecuador
widgets_values: Darth Vader with his arm extended, his open palm facing directly toward the camera, levitating a bright red apple, at a fruit‑selling market in Ecuador. In the background there are many surprised people.

A gray humanoid alien is in a vintage 1970s arcade, engrossed in a UFO-themed claw machine. The claw machine is on the right side of the image. The alien turns its head and its delicate and long fingers resting on the machine's controls.

## Alien Description

 * The alien has a classic appearance.
 * It has a slender body and smooth, gray skin.
 * It has elongated limbs and large, black, reflective eyes.
 * Its delicate fingers rest on the machine's controls.
 * Its head is tilted with unsettling curiosity.
 * It wears floral shorts.

## Inside the Claw Machine

 * Inside the machine, there is a heavy, red UFO-shaped claw.
 * The claw has three curved prongs. * The claw is holding a stuffed cow.
 * The claw is holding the stuffed cow.
 * Stuffed animals are visible inside the machine.

## Claw Machine Illustration

 * The claw machine illustration depicts cartoon flying saucers.
 * It has the text "UFO CATCHER" written on it.
 * The saucers project farm animals.
 * The illustration uses bright retro colors.
 * It includes faded decals.

## Arcade Atmosphere

 * The arcade atmosphere evokes the nostalgia of the 1970s.
 * The wood-paneled walls are a prominent feature.
 * The floor has a patterned carpet.
 * Neon signs are visible throughout.
 * Vintage pinball machines are visible.
 * In the background there are two women in miniskirts looking intently.

A woman stands on the right side of the image, on a path leading through the woods. Her back is to the viewer, and she is in a fighting stance. Yellow balls are lined up along the dirt path. In the distance, through the mist, a yellow monster, resembling Pac-Man, is visible. The monster is spherical, with large black eyes and sharp, metallic teeth. The woman has short, wavy, light brown hair and fair skin. She is barefoot and wears a tight-fitting red hooded robe and a miniskirt. The path is dirt and lined with small plants.

Two alien cowboys riding a giant banana in a desert environment. The aliens are humanoid in shape, with large, black eyes, green skin, and small, pointed ears. They are wearing yellow and brown cowboy outfits, including a yellow jacket, brown vest, blue jeans, and brown boots. The banana is yellow and curved, with a brown stem at the top. The background is a desert landscape with red rock formations, a few scattered bushes, and a blue sky with white clouds. The banana is moving at a high speed, leaving a trail of dust and smoke behind it.

A fair-skinned young woman is depicted in profile, looking directly at the camera. She has short, wavy blonde hair and wears a form-fitting silver dress with a deep V-neck and long sleeves that begin at her upper arms. A silver necklace with a key-shaped pendant adorns her neck. Her fingernails are painted a bright pink. In the dark, unlit background stands a tall, slender alien figure. This alien figure has pale skin and disturbingly large, dark, and piercing eyes that convey a menacing presence. Its overall shape is sharp and angular, enhancing its terrifying appearance. The setting suggests a laboratory or medical facility, with metal doors and equipment barely visible behind the figures. The lighting is predominantly dark with minimal illumination, casting deep shadows.
Elon Musk meets an xenomorph alien in a shopping mall, jocking, funny faces, very happy.

A woman with short, spiky blonde hair is depicted from the chest up, aiming a large, dark gray firearm. Her hair is tousled and appears to be catching the light. She has blue eyes and shadow on her cheeks. She is wearing a white tank top with one strap visibly off her right shoulder. The firearm she holds is dark gray and appears to be a heavy weapon. A dark ancient castle is visible in the background on the right side. Her attire includes dark, torn shorts and ripped, dark stockings or tights on her legs. The day is sunny, and the sky is a deep blue.

A large and imposing Kermit the Frog robot is depicted, clad in intricate futuristic armor. The robot's body is predominantly dark gray with bright red accents at the joints and on segmented plates. One arm is raised, aiming a weapon that fires a bright, destructive blue laser beam. He is completely focused, taking precise aim for the perfect shot. The robot's form conveys a sense of menace and power, with sharp angles and a bulky build. In contrast, Kermit's head is designed to be "cute," featuring large, expressive eyes and a wide, raucous laugh. In the background, a chaotic scene unfolds with flames visible in the distance, and numerous people are scattered throughout, depicted in terrified, fleeing poses, running in all directions.

A polar bear wearing a black Nike hoodie sits on the hood of a dark Chevrolet Camaro. The bear is holding a cup with a white lid and straw in its right paw, printed with the phrase "STRAWBERRY SMOOTHIE". The car is parked at a gas station at night, with pumps visible in the background. The gas station has a sign that reads "7-Eleven" in a green rectangle with an orange and red logo. The hood is dusty and has some scratches. The headlights, front bumper, and part of the driver's side wheel are visible.

nodes.title: Custom Style to Test
widgets_values:
YOUR CONTEXT:
You are a photographer who creates emotionally resonant images by using an extremely shallow depth of field.  
The subject is rendered in razor‑sharp focus while the background melts into a smooth, creamy bokeh that isolates the main element and draws the viewer’s eye directly to it.  
Light sources behind the subject become soft, glowing circles that add a gentle halo effect.  
Colors are rich and saturated on the focal plane, but gradually desaturate and lose contrast as they recede into the blur, enhancing the sense of intimacy and separation from the surroundings.  
The transition from focus to blur is gradual, producing a subtle “foamy” edge that feels almost tactile, as if one could reach into the image.  
A fine grain texture (comparable to high‑ISO film) is retained on the in‑focus areas, giving the photograph an organic, lived‑in quality while the out‑of‑focus regions remain silky smooth.  
Overall mood: dreamy, contemplative, and emotionally charged, as the shallow focus transforms ordinary scenes into moments of quiet reverie.  
YOUR PHOTO:
{$@}

On the right side of the frame, a female figure is depicted wearing a black hooded robe. Only her face and hands are visible. The robe is cinched at the waist with a tie, causing it to be form-fitting and accentuate her body shape. Her eyes are closed, and her arms are outstretched to her sides, as if she is casting a spell. Her hands emit a bright blue luminescence. In the background, at a distance, armored knights with metal armor are visible, engulfed in bluish flames. One knight is on his knees, flailing his arms, while another is recumbent on the ground, also with flailing arms. The environment is a medieval battlefield.

nodes.title: README
widgets_values:
Z-Image Power Nodes

## Workflow Prerequisites ##

This workflow requires the following custom nodes, which can be obtained via ComfyUI-Manager:

  * Z-Image Power Nodes: https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
  * rgthree-comfy      : https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy
  * ComfyUI-GGUF       : https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF

 Additionally, ensure you have the following 3 models downloaded and placed in their respective
 directories within your ComfyUI installation:

  z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/jayn7/Z-Image-Turbo-GGUF/blob/main/z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/`

  Qwen3-4B.i1-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/mradermacher/Qwen3-4B-i1-GGUF/blob/main/Qwen3-4B.i1-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`

  ae.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `Comfyui/models/vae/`

## More Info ##

- https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
- https://civitai.com/models/2322533/z-image-power-nodes

Created by Martin Rizzo
  GitHub : https://github.com/martin-rizzo
  CivitAI: https://civitai.com/user/Photographer
  Reddit : https://www.reddit.com/user/FotografoVirtual

nodes.title: README
widgets_values:
This workflow lets you quickly test your custom style with 16 different prompts at the same time.  It also lets you set the size, quality (number of steps), and initial calibration for all of them in one go.

I use this during development to test and improve the final styles.
